reasoning: The forecasting question asks whether the US national deposit rate for 12-month CDs (FRED series NDR12MCD) increased by 2025-12-09 and 2026-02-07 compared to its value on 2025-11-09. Since the resolution dates are in the past relative to the forecast date (2026-04-12) and the exact final values indicate a clear downward trajectory, it is almost certain the rate did not increase by either resolution date.
